title: jacobaea cernua
intro: Jacobaea cernua, also known as the hairy knapweed or narrow-leaved knapweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Jacobaea cernua include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Jacobaea cernua is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
